steps.title: Identify the time signal
steps.content: The word “Currently” is the key clue—it signals that the action is happening in the present time, right now.

steps.title: Match the verb tense to the time signal
steps.content: “hangs” is present tense, which matches the present-time signal of “currently.” The other three choices use past or future tenses that contradict this signal. That matches choice B — B is correct.
